title: global ProcScript
text: global ProcScript A development object that defines a ProcScript module in a library, and which can be called by any other ProcScript at runtime. Related Links Global ProcScripts Global ProcScripts are global objects that are located in a runtime library and can be called from any ProcScript in the application. They enable you to define common functionality for use by one or more applications. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
